rules.rule: PR title must follow the format: [CATEGORY]: [Description Of Work Completed].
[CATEGORY] must be in CAPS and taken from the approved category list.
[Description Of Work Completed] must be in Pascal Case.

Approved categories: FOUNDATIONS, PROCESSINGS, ORCHESTRATIONS, COORDINATIONS, MANAGEMENTS, AGGREGATIONS, VIEWS, COMPONENTS, PAGES, ACCEPTANCE, INTEGRATION, DATA, BROKERS, CONTROLLERS, INFRA, CONFIG, DOCUMENTATION, DESIGN, IMPORT, STATUS, PROVISION, RELEASE.
To auto-close an issue on merge, add Closes #[issue-number] anywhere in the PR description.
To close multiple issues, list each separately: Closes #10, closes #123.
To link an issue without auto-closing, use #[issue-number] without a keyword.
PR title category must not be lowercase or mixed-case — foundations: and Foundations: are both wrong.
PR title description must not be vague — fix, update, changes, wip without specifics are forbidden.
PR title must not use a category not in the approved category list.
